# Analyst Brief — BrightLine Research (Q1 2025)

BrightLine Research rates Project Solaris as LOW-TO-MODERATE RISK.

Reasoning:
- Helios Labs has a track record of hitting efficiency targets within ±1 pp
- The 28.4% prototype achieved in 2024 is ahead of the internal milestone curve
- Tandem architecture has strong theoretical support

Estimated probability of Solaris hitting its 2027 efficiency target: 72%.

Note: BrightLine's estimate directly contradicts the NovaGreen Capital brief
(35% probability) issued the same quarter. The two firms used different
degradation assumptions.
